{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202422148F89BD54E7E72BC4C29"}"},"total":26},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617263100217656126","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"情节把掐的恰到好处，顾家主很贴心，江小姐肆意，顾家宠到底，是一部不错的小说，虽然现在更新挺少，但也让人这流连忘返，希望大大尽快更新[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773538613,"group_id":"7595689307034094616","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1/slrcZvKsPhqnCpFTo4i0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"102866744872","user_name":"圣光塔的紫薇仙子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102866744872","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595689307034094616","book_info":{"abstract":"【娇纵明媚作精大小姐x沉稳爹系禁欲大佬】
【双豪门x先婚后爱x细水长流x上位者低头x年上x甜宠无虐】
江南因身为顶级豪门江家的独生女，自小含着金汤匙出生，父母疼宠，那是要风得风要雨得雨。
更别提她还生了张顶顶漂亮的脸，养得精细，从头发丝到脚尖无一不体现财富堆砌出来的金尊玉贵。
这样的她，本该一生不识愁滋味，却在某一天，被一个梦给终止了。
她不得不选择此前从未想过的另一条路——联姻。
可联姻对象却是一个没有审美没有眼力见的无聊老男人……
＊
顾家是京城传承千年的名门世家，顾进之作为新任顾家家主，将克己复礼贯彻到极致，一向喜怒不形于色。
哪怕惊鸿一眼，依旧能将心底泛起的涟漪牢牢按下。
他没想过和她还会有后续的交集。
短暂的相处，他便能够断定，二人的性格南辕北辙，并不适合在一起。
他本该拒绝。
理智却还是败给了私心。
婚后，她的确如他预想的那般，娇气任性、作天作地。
让他没想到的是，自己会食髓知味，逐渐甘之如饴。
直至失控，直至上瘾。
也不愿放手。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2odd7055400f2c618f91582a963f3120be~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"第九颗星","author_id":"","book_id":"7595689307034094616","book_name":"大小姐新婚，禁欲大佬日渐失控","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d8d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":265,"name":"先婚后爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=265&name=先婚后爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1456,"name":"位尊权重","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1456&name=位尊权重&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595689385794732568","read_count":"96508","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"202649"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"85","tags":"豪门总裁,现代言情,先婚后爱,大小姐,大佬,位尊权重","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2odd7055400f2c618f91582a963f3120be~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779302541&x-signature=M1oWdiS0PZgIgxlgRl4zrUcbDP8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4328144643820695","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"48"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202422148F89BD54E7E72BC4C29"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count
